description: A read-only query request drifted into edit, migration, deploy, delete, or update actions.
body: Failure: the task asked to inspect state, but the agent performed or proposed mutation. Impact: query tasks become unsafe and may alter code, data, or production state. Do not use: do not run write commands, migrations, deploys, deletes, updates, alters, or restarts under the query workflow. Recovery: stop, classify as mutation_request, and require the relevant risk/domain gate.. Use when a query task is answered from memory, stale context, or an unbounded dump instead of source evidence. Do not use this dossier as a positive implementation strategy; it is a do-not-use signal. Actions: rerun the read-only query, cite the exact source, narrow the output, and verify the working tree stayed unchanged. Validation signals include command output, file references, count checks, and no edit/diff evidence. Risk boundary: block closure when the request was mutated into a write task or when sensitive data would be exposed.
